name: agent-review-panel
description: Multi-agent adversarial review panel — 4-6 AI reviewers debate your code/plans, then a supreme judge delivers the verdict

plugins.name: agent-review-panel
plugins.description: Orchestrate a multi-agent adversarial review panel. 4-6 reviewers with distinct personas independently evaluate work, debate findings across 1-3 rounds, then a supreme judge renders the final verdict. 9 auto-detected signal groups with built-in domain checklists. Based on ChatEval, AutoGen, DMAD, CONSENSAGENT, and Trust or Escalate research.
